instructions.name: CreateTransaction
expected_state_changes: creates a new draft transaction in the multisig
risk_rules: creator must be a member of the multisig
RISK: verify the transaction being created is expected

instructions.name: ExecuteTransaction
expected_state_changes: executes the multisig transaction after all required approvals
performs CPI to target programs as specified in the transaction
risk_rules: member must be a member of the multisig
RISK: CPI targets must be reviewed — multisig can execute arbitrary transactions
RISK: verify all required approvals have been collected before execution

instructions.name: AddMember
expected_state_changes: adds a new member to the multisig
risk_rules: member must be signer and have admin permissions
RISK: PERMISSION_ESCALATION — adding members changes who can approve transactions
